name: Tee Flat's Indoor Golf Studio | Montgomery, Texas
address: 763 Fish Creek Thoroughfare Suite 110, Montgomery, TX 77316
about: Tee Flat's is a state-of-the-art indoor golf studio located in Pine Market, serving the Woodforest and surrounding communities in Montgomery, Texas. The facility focuses on providing a comprehensive golf experience with cutting-edge technology and personalized instruction. It features four Trackman simulator bays, a high-tech PuttView putting green (coming February 2026), custom club fittings, and a lounge area. A Class A PGA-certified professional offers family-friendly golf lessons for players of all skill levels, focusing on helping beginners get started, advanced golfers improve, and everyone compete and enjoy the game year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for detailed swing and ball data analysis
Year-round indoor play in a climate-controlled environment
Personalized club fittings and instruction from a Class A PGA professional

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned; BYOB policy not explicitly stated
No on-site bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Four simulator bays equipped with Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility does not specify if club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons, fittings, and simulator play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar, and no explicit BYOB policy is stated. It's best to contact the venue directly for clarification on outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website. Simulator play time can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Tee Flat's kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Flat's advertises itself as a family-friendly venue with lessons and programs suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
